## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally — lint → build → contrast → scopes, all green
- [ ] Branch flow respected: feature → `develop` (`main` is the released line)
- [ ] Tokens changed? `scopes.snapshot.json` refreshed + a contrast pair added for any new `on-*`/text/border pairing
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour / `exports` / counts changed
